name: The Peria Karamalai Tea and Produce Company Limited
summary: The Peria Karamalai Tea and Produce Company Limited engages in the production and distribution of tea in India. The company operates through Tea, Investment, and Power segments. Its plantations cover approximately 6,000 acres of land located in the Anamalai Hills, Coimbatore District in Tamil Nadu. The company also generates and distributes power through solar and wind energy. In addition, it invests in financial instruments. The company was incorporated in 1913 and is headquartered in Coimbatore, India.
